2025-26 UC San Diego Tritons Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 23-11 (12-8, 3rd in Big West MBB)

Coach: Clint Allard

PS/G: 75.7 (178th of 365)

PA/G: 70.3 (76th of 365)

SRS: 2.00 (135th of 365)

SOS: -2.00 (182nd of 365)

ORtg: 108.4 (210th of 365)

DRtg: 100.7 (45th of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
